description: Hosted, read-only options-flow and market-intelligence MCP server — 26 tools for unusual options activity, gamma exposure (GEX), Apex magnet levels, sector rotation, earnings flow, premarket gappers, congressional & Form 4 insider trades, screeners, and dividend/IPO/economic calendars. Remote HTTP endpoint at https://api.traderdaddy.pro/api/v1/mcp with Bearer `td_live_` key; a free keyless premarket-gapper endpoint is at https://api.traderdaddy.pro/api/mcp/free. Works with Claude Desktop, Claude Code, and Cursor.

notes: Bearer `td_live_` API key from a TraderDaddy Pro subscription; the free premarket-gapper endpoint at https://api.traderdaddy.pro/api/mcp/free is keyless.
